mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.topic_id, p.title, p.content, p.images, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.view_count, p.status, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.nickname as user_nickname, t.name as topic_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN topic t ON p.topic_id = t.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
